known_issues: Delete responses feature is missing required username and password authentication

existing_features.title: When a user attempts to delete a student response in ResponseViewer, display an authentication modal (AuthModal) that requires both a username and password before the deletion is executed. The delete action must only proceed if valid credentials are provided.

new_feature_requests.summary: Add username and password authentication required to delete responses

projectName: Require username and password authentication to delete responses
